title: Bomb Explodes at Damascus Cafe, Killing at Least 6
summary_full: The blast, near the Syrian capital’s main courthouse, underscored the country’s persistent instability as its leaders try to chart a path out of years of dictatorship and war.
summary_public: The blast, near the Syrian capital’s main courthouse, underscored the country’s persistent instability as its leaders try to chart a path out of years of dictatorship and war.

SY.label: negative
SY.evidence: country’s persistent instability as its leaders try to chart a path
